samples.xml_description:
<module id="parallel2serial">
    <description>Parallel-to-serial converter, converting 4-bit parallel data to 1-bit serial output (MSB first).</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal used for synchronous operations.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Reset signal. Active low (0 for reset, 1 for active).</input>
        <input id="d" width_description="[3:0]">4-bit parallel data input.</input>
        <output id="valid_out">Valid signal indicating the availability of serial output.</output>
        <output id="dout">Serial output representing the converted data.</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>On each clock cycle, convert 4-bit parallel input to 1-bit serial output (MSB first). Set valid_out to 1 when valid data is available. Shift data left after each output until all bits are processed.</implementation>
</module>
